prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild warehouse, Sora Brightford, a feminine quartermaster in a neat vest and guild sash, and Sora Mistfell, an androgynous crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron with ash-stained gloves; Sora Brightford reaches up to catch a glowing mana crystal floating in mid-air due to a gravity anomaly while Sora Mistfell steadies a wooden crate drifting nearby, bright market-stall RPG lighting, cinematic camera, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild warehouse shot; Sora Mistfell uses a brass tool to anchor the floating wooden crate to the floor, while Sora Brightford carefully places the captured mana crystal into a secure containment box held by Mistfell, maintaining consistent identities and camera, no text, no watermark.
